text: {"fixed_xml":"<ITEM>In denen Thurneysischen Buchläden allhier, seynd dato folgende zwey Bücher zu haben, so in Nancy durch Sübscriptiones gedruckt worden. <BIBL><TITLE>Dictionnaire Universel- Francois & Latin, Vulgairement appellé Dictionaire de Trevoux</TITLE>, avec des Remarques d Erudition & de Critique <VOLUME>5. Tom.</VOLUME> <FORMAT>fol.</FORMAT> <YEAR>1741</YEAR>; davon die 3. ersten Tom. dato schon zu beziehen sind; das gantze Werck kostet samt der Fracht <PRICE>fl. 24</PRICE></BIBL>. <BIBL><TITLE>Dictionaire Oeconomique, continant les moyens d'Augmenter son dien & de conserver sa sante</TITLE>, par <AUTHOR>Mister Noel Chomel</AUTHOR>, Augmente dun Nouveau Supplement de deur Volumes, par <AUTHOR>F. Marset, Doct. en Medecines</AUTHOR> .<FORMAT>2vec fig.</FORMAT> <VOLUME>4. Tom.</VOLUME> <FORMAT>fol.</FORMAT> <YEAR>1741</YEAR>; davon der erste Tomus dato bey ihnen zu beziehen ist; diß gantze Werck kostet samt der Fracht <PRICE>fl. 18</PRICE></BIBL>. So dann sind bey ihnen auch genugsam annoch zu haben: <BIBL><TITLE>Dictionaire Historique & Critique de Mr. Bayle</TITLE>- <VOLUME>4. Tom.</VOLUME> <FORMAT>fol.</FORMAT> <PLACE>Amsterd.</PLACE> <YEAR>1740</YEAR>. à <PRICE>L. 27</PRICE></BIBL>. <BIBL><TITLE>Corpus Juris Civilis Romani, cum Notis Gotofrest</TITLE> <VOLUME>2. Tom.</VOLUME> <FORMAT>fol.</FORMAT> <YEAR>1740</YEAR>. à <PRICE>fl. 10. 48. xr.</PRICE></BIBL>. <BIBL><TITLE>Dictionaire Royal, Francois-Allemand-Latin, par le R. P. Fr. Pomey</TITLE> <VOLUME>3. Voll.</VOLUME> <FORMAT>4°.</FORMAT> <YEAR>1741</YEAR>. à <PRICE>fl. 5. 24. xr.</PRICE></BIBL></ITEM>","number_of_corrections":10,"explanation":"Corrections made: (1) Fixed mismatched tag <PRIZE>fl. 5. 24. xr.</PRICE> at the end — the opening tag was PRIZE but the closing tag was PRICE; standardized to <PRICE>. (2-4) Renamed the three other misspelled <PRIZE>...</PRIZE> element pairs to the correct <PRICE>...</PRICE> tag for consistency with the rest of the document. (5-8) Escaped four unescaped ampersands (&) as & to make the XML well-formed. (9) Repaired mojibake/encoding artifacts (e.g. '√§' → 'ä', '√ºcher' → 'ücher', '√©' → 'é', '√ü' → 'ß', '√†' → 'à', '√≤' → '°') throughout the text. (10) Normalized 'di√ü' to 'diß'. The overall tag structure (ITEM, BIBL, TITLE, AUTHOR, VOLUME, FORMAT, YEAR, PLACE, PRICE) was otherwise sound and preserved."}
